notes: Reviewed exact Wikimedia Commons source manifest for Media Phase 3O. Do not download images in this task; Wikimedia File sourceUrl values are intentionally provided without downloadUrl so the importer can auto-resolve originals. No generic images are included. Outlets with fewer than two exact safe sources are recorded in reviewSummary only and deferred for future documented generic production-safe fill.

excludedSources.reason: Verified licensed exact La Vallée source, but not added because this batch only adds entries for outlets with at least two exact safe sources.

reviewSummary.manifestDecision: Create manifest entries only for outlets with two or more exact production-safe sources: cheshire-oaks, the-mall-firenze, and barberino. Defer la-vallee-village, castel-romano, las-rozas-village, designer-outlet-malaga, and noventa to future generic production-safe fill or additional exact-source discovery.
